name: UNIVERSAL DISPLAY CORP. Registe
summary: Universal Display Corporation develops, manufactures, and sells organic light emitting diode (OLED) technologies and materials for use in display and lighting applications. The company's business model revolves around licensing its OLED technologies and selling proprietary OLED materials to display and lighting manufacturers. Headquartered in Ewing, New Jersey, Universal Display Corporation enables more efficient and colorful displays in smartphones, televisions, and other devices.
